thinking.text: The autotune completed but it shows "Trials: 1 Best score: unknown" which means it only ran one trial and the best score is unknown. This might be because the autotune needs more time or there's an issue. Let me check if the model file was created and test it.

detail.visible_answer:
{
  "analysis": "Autotune completed but it seems limited (only 1 trial). The model might have been saved. Let me check if /app/model.bin exists and test it on the test data.",
  "plan": "Check the output model, rename it to /app/model.bin if needed, and evaluate on the test set.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -la /app/model* 2>/dev/null; ls -la /app/model.bin 2>/dev/null || echo "checking"
",
      "duration": 0.2
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
import fasttext

# Check if model exists
import os
if os.path.exists('/app/model.bin'):
    print('model.bin exists')
    model = fasttext.load_model('/app/model.bin')
    result = model.test('/tmp/test.txt')
    print(f'Test samples: {result[0]}, P@1: {result[1]:.4f}, R@1: {result[2]:.4f}')
    size_mb = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / 1024 / 1024
    print(f'Model size: {size_mb:.2f} MB')
elif os.path.exists('/app/model'):
    print('model exists')
    model = fasttext.load_model('/app/model')
    result = model.test('/tmp/test.txt')
    print(f'Test samples: {result[0]}, P@1: {result[1]:.4f}, R@1: {result[2]:.4f}')
    size_mb = os.path.getsize('/app/model') / 1024 / 1024
    print(f'Model size: {size_mb:.2f} MB')
else:
    print("No model found")
EOF
",
      "duration": 2.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
